summary: Very low‑quality recording with uncertain provenance; listeners struggle to hear the music.
review: Both reviewers complain that the tape is hard to listen to because of poor sound quality and they question whether it even comes from a known show in the November 1970 run. No musical details or standout moments are mentioned, indicating the performance cannot be evaluated from these comments.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews focus on bad sound quality and uncertain source; no positive show commentary to offset the technical flaws.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as hard to listen due to SQ; provenance is unclear, possibly misidentified from a 46th Street run.
